source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In a vacuum chamber, a proton orbits a \(1.0\,\mathrm{cm}\)-diameter metal ball \(1.0\,\mathrm{mm}\) above the surface with a period of \(1.0\,\mu\mathrm{s}\). What is the charge on the ball?
